metadata.description: Name of the Data Collection Rule.
Resource ID of the Data Collection Endpoint.
Resource ID of the target Log Analytics workspace.
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity to attach to the DCR.
Event Hub consumer group for this stream.

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend d = parse_json(RawData) |extend  Data_=tostring( d.api.request.data) | extend  RequestDataParsed = parse_json(Data_)| project TimeGenerated = todatetime(d.time_dt),BucketOwner=tostring(d.resources[0].owner.account.uid),Bucket=tostring(d.resources[0].uid),RemoteIp=tostring(d.src_endpoint.ip),Requester=tostring(d.actor.invoked_by),RequestId=tostring(d.api.request.uid),Operation=tostring(d.api.operation),Key=tostring(RequestDataParsed.key),RequestUri=tostring(RequestDataParsed.Host),ErrorCode=tostring(d.api.response.error),UserAgent=tostring(d.http_request.user_agent),HostHeader=tostring(RequestDataParsed.Host),ACLRequired= tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(d.api)).request)).data)).['x-amz-acl']),Status = tostring(d.status), TypeName = tostring(d.type_name), UserARN = tostring(d.actor.user.uid), UserARNAlt = tostring(d.actor.user.account.uid_alt), UserAccountId = tostring(d.actor.user.account.uid),BucketAccountId = tostring(d.resources[0].owner.account.uid), ResponseMessage = tostring(d.api.response.message), ResponseError = tostring(d.api.response.error),ClassName=tostring(d.class_name),CategoryName=tostring(d.category_name),ActivityName = tostring(d.activity_name),RawData
